mapper.select: select DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') as month, count(*) as counts from service_order GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month
select case order_status when 0 then '待接单' when 1 then '已接单' when 2 then '服务中' when 3 then '已完成' when 4 then '已取消' end as name, count(*) as value from service_order group by order_status
select w.name as workerName, count(so.id) as orderCount, w.rating from worker w inner join service_order so on w.id=so.worker_id group by w.id order by orderCount desc
